page: Amazon Web Services m8ib.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the m8ib server family. It is powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance features 32 virtual CPUs (vCPUs) mapped to 16 physical cores, utilizing a hyperthreading configuration of 2.0 threads per core. This hardware is managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor, which minimizes virtualization overhead and ensures dedicated resource allocation.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 33 Gbps. However, the m8ib.8xlarge does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached options. Additionally, the instance contains no GPU hardware, making it unsuitable for workloads requiring hardware acceleration.

From a resource density perspective, the m8ib.8xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring balanced compute and memory resources without the premium cost of specialized memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. The lack of local NVMe storage represents a tradeoff, requiring reliance on network storage which may impact I/O-heavy tasks. This instance is designed for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, containerized microservices, and enterprise applications.
description: Amazon Web Services m8ib.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. Built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, it features 32 vCPUs across 16 physical cores and 128.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 33 Gbps. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, presenting a clear tradeoff for I/O-intensive or graphics-heavy tasks. This resource configuration offers qualitative cost efficiency for balanced workloads, making it suitable for web serving, application hosting, containerized microservices, and enterprise software deployments. It provides a reliable foundation for standard business applications requiring consistent CPU performance and moderate memory allocation.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel processors, high-speed networking, and a standard memory-to-core ratio.
